First handoff step: Fill and import manual metric worksheet — python3 scripts/update_manual_social_stats.py --from-csv --dry-run

Current unlock gate: Fill manual metric worksheet (blocked_until_input); 0 ready, 3 blocked/warning; preview python3 scripts/update_manual_social_stats.py --from-csv --dry-run; see data/promo_unlock_sequence.json.
Review handoff preview health: 3 preview-clean, 5 missing input; see data/human_handoff_resolution_preview.json.

Refresh automation coverage: latest scheduled run has not covered c7d56b40; dispatch https://github.com/lilyrooartist/lilyrooartist.github.io/actions/workflows/promo-admin-refresh.yml or wait for the next scheduled run.

Refresh manual metrics: 6 worksheet row(s) still need new_value entries (blocked_until_new_values_filled); preview with python3 scripts/update_manual_social_stats.py --from-csv --dry-run after filling values.

Collect experiment results: 84 post-result field(s) need new_value plus evidence_note; use admin/reports/experiment-result-clipboard.md; first priority: measure FP-AUTO-265 on Facebook. Direct preview template: python3 scripts/update_experiment_results.py --post-id FP-AUTO-265 --source-row 33 --views VALUE --evidence-note 'SOURCE analytics YYYY-MM-DD' --dry-run. Direct apply template after review: python3 scripts/update_experiment_results.py --post-id FP-AUTO-265 --source-row 33 --views VALUE --evidence-note 'SOURCE analytics YYYY-MM-DD' --apply --refresh-admin. Then preview import with python3 scripts/update_experiment_results.py --from-wide-csv data/experiment_result_entry_wide_template.csv --dry-run after filling data/experiment_result_entry_wide_template.csv.
Apply verified store URLs: 1 music site snapshot(s) found public URLs; copy them into data/distrokid_release_status.json and refresh Admin.
Preview clear approved backlog row: python3 scripts/reschedule_scheduled_posts.py --id FP-WIN-ANALOG-MYTH-X-RELEASE-ART-IMAGE-STORY-HOOK --start-at '2026-07-02T10:00:00-04:00' --spacing-hours 24

Restart song-forward distribution: approve draft posts, clear executor blockers, and keep weekly metrics current.
